title: Iran Choosing Mojtaba Khamenei as Supreme Leader Signals Defiance Amid War
summary_full: Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei could prove to be even more radical than his father and predecessor, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, who was killed by the U.S. and Israel at the start of the war.
summary_public: Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei could prove to be even more radical than his father and predecessor, Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, who was killed by the U.S. and Israel at the start of the war.

IL.label: negative
IL.evidence: killed by the U.S. and Israel at the start of the war
